allow: Bash(python -c "from scraper.symbols import ABSENT, EMPTY_PAGE, MIRROR_SUFFIX; print\(repr\(ABSENT\), repr\(EMPTY_PAGE\), repr\(MIRROR_SUFFIX\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import os; os.environ['PYTHONIOENCODING']='utf-8'; from scraper.symbols import ABSENT, EMPTY_PAGE, MIRROR_SUFFIX; print\(hex\(ord\(ABSENT\)\), hex\(ord\(EMPTY_PAGE\)\), repr\(MIRROR_SUFFIX\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if 'fontawesome' in k.lower\(\) or 'awesome' in k.lower\(\)]")
